settings.gg0Ec4UHS_s_text: 2. Supports Weak Roots and Thinning Edges
settings.gg8n6hnXUGx_text: 4. Less Breakage So You Can Actually Keep Your Length
settings.ggBrq_0CuGA_text: A lot of women don’t need “faster growth.” They need their hair to stop snapping off. This shampoo helps strengthen the feel of your strands so you can retain length, reduce shedding from dryness, and keep more of the hair you’re growing. The goal is stronger hair that looks healthier, thicker, and more consistent.
settings.ggCSMdB5uDP_text: 1. Helps Your Hair Recover After Wigs and Sew-Ins
settings.ggIiL_xXD9g_text: 7. Rosemary shampoo helps support the hair growth you’re aiming for while giving your hair the strength and protection it needs to stay healthy.
settings.ggU1wLgJUrS_text: Healthy growth starts at the scalp. If your scalp is dry, irritated, or clogged from styling products, your hair is fighting an uphill battle. This shampoo helps cleanse and refresh the scalp without that stripped, squeaky feeling, so your hair can stay hydrated, comfortable, and ready to thrive.
settings.ggWUc-XjkI4_text: 6. Perfect For Your Take-Down and Wash Day Routine
settings.ggXWzyG1gNK_text: This shampoo was created for Black women who wear wigs, braids, sew-ins, and protective styles but still want to keep their hair strong underneath. It supports the scalp, helps strengthen the look of thinning areas, and makes it easier to maintain a routine that actually supports regrowth. If you’re ready to protect your edges and bring your hair back, this is the wash that supports the comeback.
settings.ggdkAPeJemo_text: 5. Helps Restore Fullness With Consistent Use
settings.ggh1vTawJsJ_text: When your roots are constantly stressed, hair can start shedding, breaking, or thinning in the same areas again and again. Our rosemary formula is designed to support the scalp and help your hair feel anchored and stronger at the root. With consistent use, it helps improve the look of thickness and supports fuller-looking growth over time.
settings.ggkqI3koa6W_text: Wigs and sew-ins can create tension that slowly weakens the hairline and roots, especially around the edges. This shampoo helps you reset your scalp after installs by gently cleansing buildup and supporting a healthier foundation for regrowth. It’s made to keep your hair moisturized and balanced, so your strands feel stronger and less fragile over time.
settings.ggq0plmZwvW_text: 3. Creates a Healthier Scalp Environment for Growth
settings.ggxQQAToYUe_text: This shampoo is ideal for the moment you take your hair down and want to start fresh. It helps lift buildup, refresh the scalp, and support recovery without harsh ingredients that can make your hair feel dry or brittle. It’s gentle enough for regular use and strong enough to help you stay consistent with growth support.
settings.ggzbuyoni1h_text: If you’ve been stuck in a cycle of installs, take-downs, and feeling like your hair never fully recovers, this is your growth reset. With regular use, it supports healthier-looking thickness, improved softness, and stronger strands that don’t feel so weak after styling stress. Over time, your hair can look fuller and feel easier to manage.

settings.ggDAoJ4ec8m_text: Scientist Reveal This Rosemary Shampoo That Strengthens Roots by 40% and Forces New Growth in Days
settings.ggqGq7fZ4YU_text: Why Constant Tension from Braids and Sew-ins Can Permanently Narrow Your Follicles and the Solution That Keeps Your Roots Resilient
settings.ggr0lssAt_P_text: If your edges are thinning, your part looks wider, or your hair feels weaker after wigs and sew-ins, you’re not imagining it. Tension and friction can stress your scalp and weaken roots over time. This rosemary shampoo helps cleanse buildup, calm the scalp, and support stronger-looking growth so you can retain more length and fullness.
